task: Create a structured review plan for https://faunaflorabotanicals.com. Fetch the homepage and identify key pages and areas to audit. Organize into categories: UX/Design, Performance, Security, SEO, Accessibility, and Content Quality. Output a prioritized checklist.

Audit https://faunaflorabotanicals.com for UX/UI quality. Fetch the homepage and analyze: visual hierarchy, navigation flow, responsive design indicators, component consistency, typography, color usage, call-to-action effectiveness, and overall user experience. Provide severity-rated findings (P0-P3).

Analyze https://faunaflorabotanicals.com for accessibility compliance. Fetch the homepage and check WCAG 2.1 AA conformance: semantic HTML structure, ARIA usage, keyboard navigation indicators, color contrast, focus management, alt text on images, form labels, and screen reader compatibility. Provide specific code-level findings with severity ratings. OUTPUT REQUIREMENT: You MUST produce a comprehensive report of at least 2000 characters with detailed findings, code snippets, and remediation steps for each issue.

Perform a security review of https://faunaflorabotanicals.com. Fetch the homepage and assess: HTTPS configuration, security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options), cookie security flags, form handling, third-party script risks, and e-commerce payment security indicators. Provide P0-P3 severity ratings with remediation steps. OUTPUT REQUIREMENT: You MUST produce a comprehensive report of at least 2000 characters with detailed findings, specific header values observed, and step-by-step remediation instructions.

Analyze https://faunaflorabotanicals.com for performance. Fetch the homepage and examine: total page weight, asset sizes, image optimization opportunities, script loading strategy (defer/async), CSS delivery method, third-party script count and impact, caching headers, and Core Web Vitals indicators (LCP, FID, CLS). Provide specific measurable findings with targets.

Perform an SEO audit of https://faunaflorabotanicals.com. Fetch the homepage and analyze: title tags, meta descriptions, structured data/schema markup, Open Graph tags, canonical URLs, heading hierarchy (H1-H6), internal linking structure, mobile-friendliness signals, and content quality. Provide actionable recommendations ranked by impact. OUTPUT REQUIREMENT: You MUST produce a comprehensive report of at least 2000 characters with specific tag values found, missing elements, and prioritized recommendations with implementation examples.

Synthesize ALL prior specialist findings (UX, accessibility, security, performance, SEO) into a comprehensive executive report. Include: 1) Overall site health score (1-10) with justification, 2) Top 5 critical issues requiring immediate attention (P0/P1), 3) Top 5 quick wins (high impact, low effort), 4) Prioritized roadmap grouped into Sprint 1 (critical), Sprint 2 (high), Sprint 3 (medium), 5) Resource and effort estimates per sprint. Format with clear headers and tables.
